title: No injunction by Delhi HC yet against Nine Network over articles about BPTP Limited
description: The Delhi High Court recently directed two journalists and media company Nine Network Private Limited to ensure that principles of fair comment and reporting are adhered to when reporting about real estate company BPTP Limited [BPTP Limited vs Nitin Naresh and Ors].However, at this stage Justice Mini Pushkarna refused to grant an injunction against the journalists and Inventiva, a website run by Nine Network and covering business and finance related topics.“In case, defendant no. 1 writes any ot
